title: Karyotyping Protocol

Shipping cardboard box with styrofoam box inside. It needs to fit a T-25 standing","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ke4lx","text":"2. Small ziplock bags (that can fit a T-25)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wpgdx","text":"3. FedEx slip + FedEx Slip pouch (it has an adhesive side to attach to the box)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dykiu","text":"4. Paper towels, bubble wrap or similar product (can find by asking other labs nicely)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eortd","text":"5. Parafilm","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xkmir","text":"6. Shipping Scale (located on the 1st floor. Take the service elevator down and it should be in that corridor)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"zxdac","text":"7. Shipping tape (should be on the first floor next to the shipping scale)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ifm2h","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pxjnh","text":"Media/Reagent","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2k5ep","text":"1. Essential 8™ Medium (Thermo A1517001)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yore0","text":"2. Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) (Cytiva SH30071.03HI) (if you don't have this, that is ok)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"m0wd3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a1kba","text":"Items at Gladstone Stem Cell Core","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"w4gdw","text":"1. T-25 with sealed cap (should be in SCC, if not that is also OK)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3qvoo","text":"2. Ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9vhrv","text":"3. 50mL Conical Tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Make sure the T-25 is 40-60% confluent
Warm 100mL E8 + 15% FBS (85 mL of E8 with 15mL FBS) to 37°C.
I usually use the bead bath
Let this incubate for 30 minutes, but you can cut down this step if you don't have time
Locate a cardboard shipping box that is small and has a styrofoam box within it.
You cannot just use a styrofoam box
Clean the box with ethanol and remove old shipping information from the box
In the stem cell core, find a T-25 with sealed caps (it looks just like a regular T-25, but the cap has no filter)
If you can a T-25 with a sealed cap
You only need the caps of the sealed T-25. You will toss the bodies.
You will swap caps with this sealed T-25 after filling your sample with media
If you cannot find a T-25 with a sealed cap
You can use extra parafilm
After the media is warm, aspirate spent media from T-25 in a BSC
Hold the T-25 so the cap is facing upwards, then slowly fill the T-25 with warm E8+ 15% FBS.
If you have a sealed cap, fill up the T-25 until there is little room at the cap. Toss the excess plasticware
If you do not have a sealed cap, leave a centimeter - 1.5 centimeters of space.
NOTE: Avoid aiming the stream at cells! That can cause cells to lift.
Place excess media in a 50mL conical tube. This will be shipped as well.
Prepare items for shipping
Take the T-25 and conical tube to a bench area.
Use parafilm to fully seal the tops of the T25 and Conical tube. Be extra conscious of sealing when using the non-sealed T-25 cap.
Place the items in small ziplock bags
Submit a Characterization request form via WiCell’s website
Place items in the box
Layer the shipping box with paper towels
Place T-25 and the excess media
Add bubble wrap or similar product to prevent items from shifting during shipping
Attach ship form from WiCell’s website
Seal the box
Ship box: fill out the FedEx slip
Enter WiCell’s address
Select FedEx priority overnight
Other packaging
Select dangerous good, but shipping declaration not required
Determine the weight of the box using a scale
Charge sender
You are done! You can leave the box at the FedEx pick up location on the 1st floor at Gladstone!
creator: Claire D Clelland
